name: @borjie/employee-perf-followup
description: Wave PERF-1 — Mr. Mwikila follows up on every employee's daily performance. Per-employee scorecards (role-default KPIs + assignments + outputs), three-tier rendering (subject / supervisor / owner) per FOUNDER_LOCKED_DECISIONS_2026_05_26 §3, coaching nudges in the subject's persona-voice mode, daily 06:00 local scheduler honouring §1 quiet hours.
